message:
test: add cross-module integration test for latency → watchdog → scheduler

Chains InputLatencyCollector (per-keystroke latency percentiles),
AdaptiveWatchdog (Kalman-filter health classification from heartbeats),
and ResizeScheduler (frame budget adaptation under load). 4 tests
covering latency+watchdog informed scheduling, degraded watchdog
triggering conservative budgets, latency spike detection driving budget
reduction, and full pipeline from measurement to frame scheduling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
